india_trends.title: Accor raises its India play as domestic luxury demand reshapes hotels
india_trends.summary: Accor India's chairman Gaurav Bhushan said that the luxury hotel sector has significant growth potential. With a focus on domestic travellers, Accor plans to expand its portfolio to 300 hotels by 2030, capitalizing on the increasing demand for high-quality hospitality experiences.

india_trends.title: Govt land transfer code set up to pare disputes, boost monetisation

india_trends.title: Retail chains like Reliance Retail, DMart go on store expansion spree as demand recovers
india_trends.summary: India's top retailers added 2,182 stores in FY26, the highest in three years, driven by rising demand, tax cuts, and growing consumer preference for organised retail in smaller towns.

india_trends.title: Air India delays salary hikes, pushes cost cuts amid volatile FY26 outlook
india_trends.summary: Air India is tightening its belt. Facing global challenges, the airline is cutting costs. This move comes after significant expansion.
